headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Palantir Technologies (PLTR) After Its 100% One Year Surge?
summary: Wondering if Palantir Technologies at around US$148.46 is priced for perfection or still has room to run? This article walks through what the current share price might really imply about value. The stock has seen a 3.8% gain over the last 7 days, while the 30 day return is a 2.8% decline and the year to date return is an 11.6% decline, set against a 100.6% return over the past year and a very large 3 year gain of about 18x and a 5 year gain of about 6x. Recent coverage has focused on...

headline: Trump warns Iran '48 hours before all Hell will reign down,' while search for missing crew member intensifies
